detailedDescription:
AMD's entry-level Zen 4 processor.
6 cores at 65W — great for budget builds that still want modern DDR5 and PCIe 5.0.
additionalSpecs:
Cores: 6 | Threads: 12
L2 Cache: 6MB | L3 Cache: 32MB
Socket: AM5 (LGA1718) | Architecture: Zen 4
Process Node: TSMC 5nm (CCD) + 6nm (IOD)
Memory: DDR5-5200 dual-channel
PCIe: 28 lanes (PCIe 5.0 x16 + PCIe 5.0 x4 NVMe)
Integrated Graphics: AMD Radeon RDNA 2 (2 CUs)
Max Temp: 95°C | Unlocked Multiplier: Yes
